sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1270" key="a)dia/doxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδιά-δοχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1270.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without successor, perpetual</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βουλή</foreign> Sch.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg003.perseus-grc1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
